reviews.review_description: I like secret tag cause it’s a game that people can chill and I used to be head mod in it I took a long break of vr cause baseball and school so I’m friends with twinklefedt Aka the owner of secret tag and I’ve known him for about 9 months now and he is pretty chill I really recommend that you should definitely check out this game the mods admins owners are nice and chill I don’t know why people  are saying not to get secret tag but y ok should definitely download secret tag it’s such a w game.

my friend you are banned for no reason because this admin was following us and each code and we cannot escape him we were trying to return to play a friend and he left the game next we join a public he kept following us and yup that's how my friend got banned for no reason this game sucks i would not recommend
Best game it is so good love it
